message:
Add comptime-based type system (WIP - has regression)

Implemented comptime type inference system for maximum performance:

1. Runtime comptime_helpers.zig module:
   - InferListType() - comptime type analysis
   - Type promotion at Zig compile time
   - Supports int/float/string widening

2. Hybrid code generation:
   - Static lists (all constants) → comptime path
   - Dynamic lists → runtime widening (fallback)
   - Detects comptime-constant expressions

3. Generated code uses Zig comptime:
   - const T = comptime InferListType(@TypeOf(values))
   - inline for loops (unrolled at compile time)
   - Zero-cost type inference

Known issues:
- Test regression: 45 → 41 passing (-4 tests)
- Need to debug why some tests broke
- Comptime path might have bugs in generated code

Next steps:
- Debug test failures
- Fix comptime code generation issues
- Verify all list operations work with comptime

This establishes comptime as foundation for PyAOT performance.
